02222121120020100011110210 - ASI: 20

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  22 = 2 * 2
  001 = 00 * 1
  002 = 00 * 2
  010 = 0 * 10
  022 = 0 * 22
  210 = 2 * 10
  211 = 2 * 11
  221 = 22 * 1
  1110 = 11 * 10
  2002 = 2 * 002
  010001 = 010 * 001
  022221 = 022 * 221
  1110210 = 1110 * 210
  2112002 = 211 * 2002
  0100011110210 = 010001 * 1110210
  0222212112002 = 022221 * 2112002
  02222121120020100011110210 = 0222212112002 * 0100011110210
